programme.title: Nim's Island
programme.desc: Nim is adventure author Alex Rover's number one fan and she lives on an isolated island with her scientist father. When her father is lost at sea and the island is being invaded, she convinces the agoraphobic and a germaphobe author to come and help.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: In Back to the Future Part III, Marty travels to 1885 to save Doc from an outlaw. Packed with laughs, action, and heart, it's the epic Wild West finale to the beloved trilogy.

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E21 - Mommy’s Magic Touch
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids. Come along and be part of their fun everyday adventures.

programme.title: E7 - Moving With Mom!
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E11 - A Nap For Mommy
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E8 - Mommy’s Helping Heart
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: Reel Life Weekend 'In The Name Of The Mother'
programme.desc: A devoted mother struggles with the aftermath of her estranged husband's suicide. Two years earlier, he left her for another woman. The 54-year-old mathematician had unpayable debts and reclaimed the jewelry store she managed.

programme.desc: A magazine program that delves deep into different aspects of Filipino culture to gain better understanding of traditions, folklore, cuisine, and also demystifying old beliefs and mysteries.

programme.desc: To mark his 100th birthday, David Attenborough reflects on a remarkable life. SInce his first broadcast more than 70 years ago, Attenborough has helped reshape our understanding of the natural world.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the evolving understanding of whales, how much they have in common with humans, and how recent discoveries could help to better protect them from threats in an increasingly changing world.

programme.title: E4 - Discovering The Americas
programme.desc: During the height of the Ice Age, one of the coldest times humanity has ever known, Homo sapiens steps into the last habitable continents on the planet: the Americas.

programme.desc: Join Ryan Pyle as he explores Marrakech and goes on a trek in the Atlas Mountains.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: E18 - Teething Problems

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: E13 - Between a Truck and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Robin makes a difficult decision about his beloved mine truck 6-Pack after another expensive breakdown, while Claudia makes a desperate call for help to get their jade out of camp before winter shuts them down.

programme.title: E2 - Mission Possible
programme.desc: Who says you can't do adventure without legs? Former recon marine and war hero Jonathon lost both of his legs in Afghanistan, but his wild spirit lifts him to new heights. He takes on the wilderness with survival expert Bear Grylls and challenges everything you think you know about disability.

programme.title: E9 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: E9 - Bighorn Range

programme.title: Eyeball Action
programme.desc: How do you see the world in three dimensions? Find out as the doctors reveal the incredible eye muscles that control how you focus on things close-up and far away. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Ted has a big cut on his head, and Millie has a sore foot.

programme.title: New Mayor
programme.desc: An election is happening in Hilltown. It's usually an unimportant event since Senior is the only candidate. This year DiktaThor gets on the campaign with empty promises about superpowers for all. It's up to Sprinter to gather the town behind the drowsy Senior.

programme.title: What's so Great About Mould?
programme.desc: There are thousands of known species of mould, but they all feed off organic material and need moisture to survive. They play a vital role in returning nutrients back to ecosystems. One type, penicillin, has saved countless lives since it was used as an antibiotic.

programme.title: Newcomers
programme.desc: Marisa arrives at the shelter with eleven puppies, two cats, and seven kittens. And that is just from one household. Holly's foster dog's heritage gets revealed, and long-term resident Doris hopes for a home.

programme.title: Solving A Mystery
programme.desc: The cute homeless dogs are looking for new owners, and Johnny and Inel solve the mysteries of goats that climb trees and dogs with unusual toilet habits! The Junior Vets are trying to figure out how to give a big brown bear its medicine.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: Day of the Trash
programme.desc: Ricky is tidying up. His dad brings around a box of his old junk, including a robot, which helps him to create a pointillism picture with cotton buds. His old pogo stick inspires Ricky and his friends to make a huge pogo painting.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: The Mystery of the The Number 1 Mean Girls Detective Agency
programme.desc: When the school mean girls, Katie and Dinara, start their own detective agency and solve a rash of neighbourhood mysteries before Addison can, she wonders if she's lost her touch...or if there is something else more nefarious going on.

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: A ghost is preventing Smorph from getting to sleep but little does he know that all the ghost really wants is to have a light-up party with all his friends.

programme.title: Seashell
programme.desc: Bring the beach closer to you with these DIY activities!

programme.title: The Musical Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and her classmates are tasked with playing a piece of music written by a local billionaire, who has promised to donate funding to the school's music program – but only if Addison can solve a musical puzzle and correctly fill in the blanks in the sheet music!

programme.title: What Makes Bread Rise?
programme.desc: Bread rises thanks to a chemical reaction called fermentation and yeast, which converts sugars in the dough into carbon dioxide and ethanol. The carbon dioxide created is trapped in the elastic gluten network causing the dough to rise and expand.

programme.title: On the Spoor of the Big Snake - Part 2: Signs from the Past
programme.desc: Five young explorers continue their travels through [Ai] Ais/Richtersveld Transfrontier Park in South Africa in search of the legendary Big Snake, a spirit that can transform itself into anything. They cross from South Africa into Namibia and discover some ancient art.

programme.title: The Defence of the Bombardier Beetle
programme.desc: The bombardier beetle has evolved a special way to avoid being eaten. It mixes two chemicals together in its tummy which then explode out as a mixture of a protective chemical and boiling water. It has to be careful not to burn itself!

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Green Science and Recycling
programme.desc: What's the difference between science and green science? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of renewable energy. Have hands-on fun by making your lettuce sustainable, and get to know Ryoji Noyori, a chemist and great advocate of green chemistry.

programme.title: Reduce Food Miles
programme.desc: The Grimwades decide to reduce their food miles and set themselves a challenge to source the rest of their food for tonight's dinner locally. They go in search of some locally grown food at an allotment and return with broad beans, eggs and honey.

programme.title: A Simple Rescue
programme.desc: A little girl goes missing, and Ranger Loops and two policemen organize a search party. The kids want to help, but the policemen explain that this is not a game. However, the kids think that it could be a game. Thanks to Yoko's magic, they end up helping like real pros!

programme.title: Solving A Mystery
programme.desc: The cute homeless dogs are looking for new owners, and Johnny and Inel solve the mysteries of goats that climb trees and dogs with unusual toilet habits! The Junior Vets are trying to figure out how to give a big brown bear its medicine.

programme.title: The Big Bag Theory
programme.desc: Fresh water is abundant in some areas, and scarce in others. Is there a way to transport it to help those in need without it being too expensive? In this episode, a big floating bag made out of highly resistant plastic is hooked to a tug. Will it work?

programme.title: One Step From Stardom
programme.desc: The Icicles compete at the British Synchro Championships with their complicated new routine. But a rival team has set their sights on stealing the Icicles' crown. Ice hockey player Aren wants to follow in his older brother's footsteps.

programme.title: What Makes Bread Rise?
programme.desc: Bread rises thanks to a chemical reaction called fermentation and yeast, which converts sugars in the dough into carbon dioxide and ethanol. The carbon dioxide created is trapped in the elastic gluten network causing the dough to rise and expand.

programme.title: Achievements
programme.desc: Laura returns to find Bear, the Deerhound, well on the way to becoming as gentle as a lamb. Three tiny foster puppies are getting their examination for ringworm, and Xavier's baby barn owl is testing its wings.

programme.title: Iron
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors check out why we need iron and show you how to search for it in your cereal!

programme.title: E121 - Kid Grounded
programme.desc: When Henry is caught sneaking out at night, he is grounded, preventing him from completing his crime-fighting duties. While Piper drives him crazy at home, Charlotte steps into the sidekick role.

programme.title: E616 - Hiccups and Downs / The Loathe Boat
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition. // The Morticians Club plan Bertrand's escape from the cruise ship his parents work on.

programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. // Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.desc: Nora makes a return and targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam. With nowhere else to turn, Sam and Cat are forced to ask for some unlikely help from Nevel.

programme.title: E1 - Olivier Paradis, Trekking Guide In Morocco
programme.desc: Olivier Paradis welcomes Canadian tourists for a hike through the Moroccan High Atlas. Unfavourable weather conditions force them to change route, testing their capacity for adaptation and their flexibility of both mind and body. During their journey they cross the path of a group of noble Amazigh.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: The ''Terriennes'' portal: a site in French on the status of women around the world.

programme.title: E35 - Poka And Mine Go To The Cinema
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E36 - Aldo
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E34 - Video Game Controller
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E32 - Atta Leafcutter Ant
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: E4 - Ali Akbar (Pakistan)
programme.desc: After more than fifty years selling newspapers by shouting the headlines, Ali was made a Knight of the National Order of Merit. At 18, he left Pakistan and arrived in France without knowing the language. By selling ''Charlie Hebdo'', ''Hara-Kiri'' and later ''Le Monde'', he became an emblematic figure of the Saint-Germain-des-Pres district in Paris.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Son On The Run
programme.desc: Hung is a stuntman living with his troublesome father, Kwun. Five years ago, he deeply fell in love with May. Yet May's father strongly objected their relations and separated them trickily, with the help of Kwun. One day, May come backs - but with her six-year-old son, Sam. He begins to get back what he loses five years ago. May actually been badly ill before she comes back Hong Kong. Her only wish before die is to bring Sam back to Hung. After May has died, May's father insists to keep Sam by his sides. Hung tries his best to get back Sam. In order to earn more money, he does a very dangerous stunt. At last, he is injured...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: The Legend of Speed
programme.desc: After winning yet another race, the underground drag car racer king, Sky, was framed by his rival's brother Fung. On the run in Thailand, Sky hooks up with his long lost father, himself a legendary racer, who steers his son back on course for the ultimate showdown of speed with Fung.

programme.title: Robotrix
programme.desc: Selina, a beautiful female cop, who is assigned to bodyguard a middle eastern prince who is staying in Hong Kong. But then, a mad scientist who has transferred his mind into a cyborge which looks human comes and kills Selina, then kidnaps the prince and holds him for ransom. To save the prince and stop the evil scientist-turned killer cyborge, good scientist Dr. Sara and her cyborge assistant Ann transfer Selina's mind into the body of a cyborge that looks just like her. Now Selina, Ann, Dr. Sara and Selina's cop fiance, who has been told Selina survived the shooting and doesn't know she's a cyborge now, must team up to defeat the bad guy...

programme.title: Triads The Inside Story
programme.desc: Hung Hing Family boss Lee Qun was ambushed on his way to Macau. His heir Lee Mun-ho flew back from the States for the funeral. Mun-ho, who did not want to mingle with the mobsters, planned to return to the States for good after wrapping up his father's business in Hong Kong. However, through his intelligence and managerial skills, he turned Hung Hing into a well organized business structure. On the other hand, Yeung Kong, a young and ambitious mobster who was brought up under the old Triad tradition, strongly opposed Mun-ho...

programme.title: Let's Sing Along
programme.desc: Chu Wai Tak is a natural born introvert, a white collar worker who suffers from a serious lack of self confidence. Her greatest achievement at work is 'using 10% less toilet paper than yesterday' and saving several more cents. King's self confidence is at its peak as he has crowned himself the King of Karaoke. He becomes exhausted if he does not go to the karaoke box and sing for a few days. King loves to gain attention at the company and has indeed brought a lot of energy to a boring company...

programme.title: E4 - You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: It's been five years since Hiccup and Toothless successfully united dragons and vikings on the island of Berk.

programme.title: E4 - You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

programme.title: E5 - Bring Your Loved One To Work
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it’s a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.desc: Panini tricks Chowder into nursing an injured bluenana.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: The National Finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining ninjas compete in Stage 3 and 4 and a $1 million winner is crowned as the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: E3 - Lost In Translation
programme.desc: The team's hunt for a high-value U.S. target accused of murdering an Australian soldier takes an unexpected turn when the suspect claims to have evidence of a war crime.

programme.title: E8 - Family Man
programme.desc: The SWAT team faces off with a family of doomsday preppers barricaded inside their fortress of a home, and Deacon finds himself at the center of the storm. Also, Tan clashes with a reporter covering the situation and Powell grapples with meeting the child she gave up for adoption 18 years ago.

programme.title: E9 - The Sea And The Hills
programme.desc: BRAVO returns from Nazario's camp stunned. Forced to regroup, the team hastily develops another plan to capture him, but they walk right into a trap.

programme.title: E6 - The Reaper
programme.desc: When Simone and Carter go undercover to find an international assassin known as The Reaper, a prisoner seeking bail recognizes Carter and nearly blows his cover.

Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

programme.title: My Hong Kong Story
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Special column of character record. Through the exquisite length of about 15 minutes in each episode, it tells the stories of Hong Kong people and what happened. For the national Chinese audience, understand the new perspective of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Mainland Q&A (IV)
programme.desc: MAINLAND Q&A: Zero-distance from the heavyweights and top leaders is the draw of this program. It reveals striking details about the thoughts of the most influential decision-makers, telling viewers the pulse of the time.

The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings 'Fukushima Sake: A Comeback to the Top'
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Hideyoshi rises to become a senior retainer of the Oda clan and is granted Kita-Omi. Building Nagahama Castle, he becomes a daimyo and, together with Koichiro, takes the surname Hashiba. Tasked with governing the castle town, Koichiro struggles with a severe shortage of manpower. On Hanbei's advice, he decides to hold a selection process to recruit capable retainers. As numerous applicants gather, a group of distinctive young men-including Ishida Mitsunari (Matsumoto Reo) and Todo Takatora (Kaku So)-advance to the final stage.

programme.title: The Face I Can't Forget

programme.desc: Avec les équipes de France 24 et les grands reporters aux quatre coins du monde, une découverte des reportages long format sur des sujets d'actualité internationale.

programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Talking Europe
programme.desc: Talking Europe guides you to the world of Europe's politics and cultures. Presented by Catherine Nicholson, the program revolves around top EU issues and events. Find out latest news from politicians and researchers joined by the guests of the program.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

E354
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: E753
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E526
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: E1291
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: E2 - Meeting With A Hieral Menace

programme.title: E4 - A City Ruled By A Highlander
programme.desc: Inglis is confronting Sistia, who helps some former knights. They have a furious fight, and Sistia is defeated.

programme.title: E13 - The Very Busy Academy Festival
programme.desc: As the school festival approaches, priest Shinai, arranges a meeting with Makoto. Shinai informs Makoto about rumors concerning the shop medicine and offering to help dispel them.

programme.title: E45 - To Live Up To The Promise! Departures Of Their Own!
programme.desc: Dragon returns to his ship after seeing Saint Jalmack attack Sabo's ship. Ace and Luffy continues to grow up.

programme.title: E15 - Fricadelle With Samurai Sauce
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.title: E36 - Argy - Boussay
programme.desc: An old fortified manor of Berry, the Argy castle is located near Bourges. Its current owner is a direct descendant of the original lords who built it. Originally a medieval fortress built during the Crusades, the Boussay castle became a Renaissance residence and later an agricultural estate.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Boutillot/Redevelopment/Garden Of The Five Senses
programme.desc: Contents: Julien Boutillot, the market gardener who grows his vegetables to music; the challenges of rewilding forests; the Garden of the Five Senses in Yvoire; Don't panic: back to the retirement home.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: E4 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Impressionism
programme.desc: At the heart of the Philadelphia Museum of Art hang works by leading impressionist painters, such as Manet, Degas, Sisley, Monet, Morisot, Renoir and Pissarro.

programme.title: E15 - Fricadelle With Samurai Sauce
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.title: E36 - Argy - Boussay
programme.desc: An old fortified manor of Berry, the Argy castle is located near Bourges. Its current owner is a direct descendant of the original lords who built it. Originally a medieval fortress built during the Crusades, the Boussay castle became a Renaissance residence and later an agricultural estate.

programme.title: E13 - In Saint-Brieuc, With Maxime Tabart
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Haras de Lamballe, in Saint-Brieuc, with magician Maxime Tabart. On today's menu: grey shrimp and Paimpol bean stew.

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Street Debate: What Is Driving Young Nigerian Professionals To 'Japa'?
programme.desc: Nigeria is losing a significant number of its most talented professionals, who are leaving the country in search of better opportunities abroad. This mass migration of Nigerians is commonly referred to as 'japa.' In this week's show, Edith Kimani asks young Nigerians what is driving them to leave the country.

programme.title: E4704 - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: E227 - Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.title: E1227 - Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.desc: An epic tale that explores the eternal battle between good and evil, highlighting the quest for righteousness and spiritual awakening

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.desc: Raj, a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI, follows Simran to India to win over her strict father and marry her. Release Year: 1995 Director: Aditya Chopra Awards: 43rd National Film Awards - Best Popular Film Providing Wholesome Entertainment, 41st Filmfare Awards - Best Film

programme.title: Bang Bang
programme.desc: Harleen leads a boring life with her grandmother and works as a bank receptionist. However, her life takes a sudden turn after she falls in love with Rajveer, a thief. Release Year: 2014 Director: Siddharth Anand Awards: Surfers' Choice Award - Best Music Video--Bang Bang.

programme.title: Satte Pe Satta
programme.desc: Indu, who loves Ravi, is shocked to see his uncouth brothers and decides to civilize them. One of the brothers falls for an heiress, whose greedy uncle sends Ravi's lookalike to kill her. Release Year: 1982 Director: Raj N. Sippy

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Aparajita, an artist with a past, and Rakshit, a reserved businessman wary of love, meet. Their relationship faces challenges, but friendship and hope may spark romance.

programme.title: E2 - Home Away from Home
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.

programme.title: E3 - A Busy Bay
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Marina Bay, where the Nomads and Townies are squatting while Anna and the Bay Family are away upriver. Soak up the peaceful otter life in this luxurious waterway before the surprise early return of its rightful owners.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E6 - Indonesia - Life in the Muck
